ariaGame.name: Game region label
ariaGame.description: Screen-reader label for the whole play area.

headerScore.name: Score label
headerScore.description: Label preceding the live distance score in the header.

headerBest.name: Best score label
headerBest.description: Label preceding the session-best score in the header.

verifiedBadge.name: Verified badge
verifiedBadge.description: Short HUD badge shown once the run reaches the pass score; the captcha is satisfied and the visitor may keep running.

startTitle.name: Start screen title
startTitle.description: Headline shown on the start screen before the first run.

startBody.name: Start screen body
startBody.description: Short instructions shown on the start screen.

startButton.name: Start button
startButton.description: Label for the button that begins the run.

controlsHint.name: Controls hint
controlsHint.description: Small keyboard-controls reminder shown under the start button.

gameOverTitle.name: Game over title
gameOverTitle.description: Headline shown when the runner crashes. This is the text the host fully controls (the original Chrome game hard-coded it).

verifiedTitle.name: Verified end-screen title
verifiedTitle.description: End-screen headline shown instead of the game-over title when the run cleared the pass score (success framing).

gameOverScore.name: Game over score line
gameOverScore.description: Final score shown on the game-over screen.

gameOverBest.name: Game over best line
gameOverBest.description: Session-best score shown on the game-over screen.

restartButton.name: Restart button
restartButton.description: Label for the button that restarts after a crash.

ariaJump.name: Jump control label
ariaJump.description: Screen-reader / touch-button label for the jump action.

ariaDuck.name: Duck control label
ariaDuck.description: Screen-reader / touch-button label for the duck action.

ariaSound.name: Sound toggle label
ariaSound.description: Accessible label for the in-game button that turns sound on / off.

announceStart.name: Announcer: run started
announceStart.description: Live-region message when the run begins.

announceVerified.name: Announcer: verified
announceVerified.description: Live-region message when the run reaches the pass score and the captcha is satisfied; encourages continuing for a higher score.

announceGameOver.name: Announcer: game over
announceGameOver.description: Live-region message when the runner crashes.

announceNewBest.name: Announcer: new best
announceNewBest.description: Live-region message when the run sets a new session best.

English.ariaGame: Endless runner. Jump the cactus, duck the birds, and run as far as you can.
English.startBody: Jump the cactus and duck the birds. Run as far as you can without crashing.
English.controlsHint: Space or Up to jump, Down to duck

Chinese (Simplified).ariaGame: 无尽跑酷。跳过仙人掌，躲开飞鸟，尽量跑得更远。
Chinese (Simplified).startBody: 跳过仙人掌，躲开飞鸟。在不撞上障碍的情况下尽量跑得更远。
Chinese (Simplified).controlsHint: 空格或上键跳跃，下键下蹲
Chinese (Simplified).announceGameOver: 游戏结束。你得了 {score} 分。

Spanish.ariaGame: Carrera sin fin. Salta los cactus, esquiva los pájaros y corre lo más lejos que puedas.
Spanish.startBody: Salta los cactus y esquiva los pájaros. Corre lo más lejos que puedas sin chocar.
Spanish.controlsHint: Espacio o flecha arriba para saltar, abajo para agacharte

Arabic.ariaGame: جري بلا نهاية. اقفز فوق الصبار، وتفادَ الطيور، واركض أبعد ما تستطيع.
Arabic.startBody: اقفز فوق الصبار وتفادَ الطيور. اركض أبعد ما تستطيع دون أن تصطدم.
Arabic.controlsHint: مسافة أو السهم العلوي للقفز، السهم السفلي للانحناء

Portuguese.ariaGame: Corrida sem fim. Pule os cactos, desvie dos pássaros e corra o mais longe que conseguir.
Portuguese.startBody: Pule os cactos e desvie dos pássaros. Corra o mais longe que conseguir sem bater.
Portuguese.controlsHint: Espaço ou seta para cima para pular, para baixo para abaixar
Portuguese.announceGameOver: Fim de jogo. Você fez {score} pontos.

French.ariaGame: Course sans fin. Sautez par-dessus les cactus, esquivez les oiseaux et courez le plus loin possible.
French.startBody: Sautez par-dessus les cactus et esquivez les oiseaux. Courez le plus loin possible sans vous écraser.
French.controlsHint: Espace ou flèche haut pour sauter, bas pour se baisser

German.ariaGame: Endlos-Lauf. Spring über die Kakteen, duck dich unter den Vögeln und lauf so weit du kannst.
German.startBody: Spring über die Kakteen und duck dich unter den Vögeln. Lauf so weit du kannst, ohne zu verunglücken.
German.controlsHint: Leertaste oder Pfeil hoch zum Springen, runter zum Ducken
German.announceGameOver: Spiel vorbei. Du hast {score} Punkte erreicht.

Russian.ariaGame: Бесконечный забег. Перепрыгивай кактусы, уворачивайся от птиц и беги как можно дальше.
Russian.startBody: Перепрыгивай кактусы и уворачивайся от птиц. Беги как можно дальше, не врезаясь.
Russian.controlsHint: Пробел или стрелка вверх, чтобы прыгнуть, вниз, чтобы пригнуться

Japanese.ariaGame: エンドレスラン。サボテンを飛び越え、鳥をかわして、できるだけ遠くまで走ろう。
Japanese.startBody: サボテンを飛び越え、鳥をかわそう。ぶつからずに、できるだけ遠くまで走ってね。
Japanese.controlsHint: スペースか上キーでジャンプ、下キーでしゃがむ
Japanese.announceVerified: 認証済み。スコア {score}。その調子。
Japanese.announceGameOver: ゲームオーバー。スコアは {score} でした。

Korean.ariaGame: 끝없는 달리기. 선인장을 뛰어넘고, 새를 피하며, 최대한 멀리 달리세요.
Korean.startBody: 선인장을 뛰어넘고 새를 피하세요. 부딪히지 않고 최대한 멀리 달리세요.
Korean.controlsHint: 스페이스나 위쪽 키로 점프, 아래쪽 키로 숙이기

Indonesian.ariaGame: Lari tanpa henti. Lompati kaktus, hindari burung, dan berlarilah sejauh mungkin.
Indonesian.startBody: Lompati kaktus dan hindari burung. Berlarilah sejauh mungkin tanpa menabrak.
Indonesian.controlsHint: Spasi atau panah atas untuk lompat, bawah untuk menunduk
